title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Expeditors India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Expeditors India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!
